constraints: core.yaml path_allowlist is enforced as an EXACT rglob set over support/checkers/profiles (rule_runners.run_path_allowlist lines 83-91 raise on observed-minus-allowed). check_profile.py auto-discovers profiles via glob('*.yaml') (lines 1048,1108) under --all; case sections are dispatched by section-name key (SECTION_DISPATCH, e.g. line 251 compose_building_case). Moved sections must keep their recognized section keys verbatim.
KERNEL_CHECK_IDS is fixed by KERNEL_DISPATCH (line 921); the moved kernel_check IDs already exist, so no new kernel-check registration is needed unless a runner is added.

agent_axis_behavioral.yaml self-pins its own path (path_exists line 59), so it must remain on disk as a thinned profile after B3; do not delete the file.
